meaning: v.练习,实习,实践,实行,操持(专业等),竭力想,利用(某人之轻信等),实施
examples: He usually wants to practise his English on me.
Practise mental arithmetic when you go out shopping.
If you practise speaking English, you'll soon improve.
They were repeatedly given advice about how to practise safe sex, according to Merck.
We practise that every training session and it's great to be involved with it.
